creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have made a new port 'mlvwm' and uploaded.
ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/incoming/ports-jp/x11/mlvwm-0.6.2-970119.tar.gz
Mlvwm is Macintosh like virtual window manager.
It's not a patch-kit like as fvwm95 but is coded from first step
like as qvwm.
Please take a look.

				Yukihiro Nakai
				<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
